name: UNILATERAL MEGALENCEPHALY
definition: hamartomatous overgrowth of all / part of a cerebral hemisphere with neuronal migration
dominant_finding: moderate / marked enlargement of one hemisphere
discriminating_features: moderate / marked enlargement of one hemisphere
ipsilateral ventriculomegaly proportionate to enlargement of affected hemisphere
straightened frontal horn of ipsilateral ventricle pointing anterolaterally

general: moderate / marked enlargement of one hemisphere
ipsilateral ventriculomegaly proportionate to enlargement of affected hemisphere
straightened frontal horn of ipsilateral ventricle pointing anterolaterally
white matter gliosis (low density in white matter on CT, prolonged T1 + T2 relaxation
